AetherLake

Appearance

AetherLakeOpen-Source Data Lakehouse

Deploy a production-grade, fully integrated data stack on Kubernetes with a single helm install.

Get Started
View on GitHub

🏗️ Modular Design

Enable or disable any component (Trino, Spark, Airflow, MinIO) via a single Helm value toggle.

🔐 Secure by Default

Centralized SSO with Keycloak and RBAC across all services out of the box.

🎛️ Unified Control

Manage the entire platform, run SQL queries, and monitor pods from the Next.js Control Panel.

Released under the Apache 2.0 License.

Built with ❤️ for the open-source data community
